English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Properties Management Department. Records
Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Properties Management Department
28-2-2405
29.7 cubic feet. 29.7 cubic feet.
1943-2004. Research, course material, specification files, architectural plans. Curriculum review reports, consulting files, specifications and estimates for the Statler Hall, research studies, Statler design studios files, and course materials for Properties Management courses at Cornell, including 20 architectural drawings of the Statler Hotel. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 12 18 1 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 13 14 15 16 17 19 20 21 22 26 23 24 25 27 28 31 29 30 ? (unprocessed) ? (unprocessed) ======= 12 18 1 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 13 14 15 16 17 19 20 21 22 26 23 24 25 27 28 31 29 30 ? (unprocessed) ? (unprocessed) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2093029
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
August 2016
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, August 2016
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Curriculum review reports, consulting files, specifications and estimates for the Statler Hall, research studies, Statler design studios files, and course materials for Properties Management courses at Cornell, including 20 architectural drawings of the Statler Hotel.
Cite As:
Properties Management Department Records, #28-2-2405. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Hotel management -- Study and teaching.
2093029 <<<<<<< HEAD Link to a finding aid.
